settings.content: Brand colour tokens (white background #FFFFFF, warm-nude accent #B8957B, near-black ink #0A0A0A) are defined in CSS at assets/santai.css and will be exposed as theme settings in a future session.
Type system: Newsreader (display, weight 300) + Manrope (body) + JetBrains Mono (monospace). Loaded from Google Fonts.
